treatment_information.specific_treatment: incision and drainage of right sided seroma and left sided fluid collection

treatment_timeline.event: Patient underwent left modified radical mastectomy and right oncoplastic reduction.
Patient re-admitted due to complications from previous surgeries.
Incision and drainage of seromas performed.
Discharge instructions given for continuing antibiotic regiment.

patient_outcome.final_status: Patient discharged to an Extended Care Facility, mental status clear and coherent.
patient_outcome.follow_up_details: Continue antibiotic regimen for seven more days.
patient_outcome.long_term_prognosis: Improved but ongoing management for comorbid conditions.
